headline: Rollins Reinforces Long-Term Value Creation Strategy and Medium-Term Growth Algorithm
summary: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE: ROL) ("Rollins" or the "Company"), a premier global consumer and commercial services company, today highlighted its strategy for driving sustainable, long-term value creation through a resilient, capital-light business model, a durable organic growth engine, disciplined M&A, and a balanced approach to capital allocation.
